description: Component that scores and qualifies leads for sales prioritization.

asset_name.label: Asset Name
asset_name.description: Name of the lead scoring asset to create

scoring_model.label: Scoring Model
scoring_model.description: Scoring model: fit_only, intent_only, or combined

company_size_weight.label: Company Size Weight
company_size_weight.description: Weight for company size in fit score

industry_weight.label: Industry Weight
industry_weight.description: Weight for industry match in fit score

job_title_weight.label: Job Title Weight
job_title_weight.description: Weight for job title relevance in fit score

geography_weight.label: Geography Weight
geography_weight.description: Weight for geography match in fit score

budget_weight.label: Budget Weight
budget_weight.description: Weight for budget indicators in fit score

email_engagement_weight.label: Email Engagement Weight
email_engagement_weight.description: Weight for email engagement in intent score

website_activity_weight.label: Website Activity Weight
website_activity_weight.description: Weight for website visits in intent score

content_consumption_weight.label: Content Consumption Weight
content_consumption_weight.description: Weight for content downloads in intent score

product_interest_weight.label: Product Interest Weight
product_interest_weight.description: Weight for product page views in intent score

mql_threshold.label: Mql Threshold
mql_threshold.description: Score threshold for Marketing Qualified Lead

sql_threshold.label: Sql Threshold
sql_threshold.description: Score threshold for Sales Qualified Lead

hot_lead_threshold.label: Hot Lead Threshold
hot_lead_threshold.description: Score threshold for hot lead classification

warm_lead_threshold.label: Warm Lead Threshold
warm_lead_threshold.description: Score threshold for warm lead classification

include_score_breakdown.label: Include Score Breakdown
include_score_breakdown.description: Include fit and intent score breakdown

apply_time_decay.label: Apply Time Decay
apply_time_decay.description: Apply time decay to behavioral signals

time_decay_days.label: Time Decay Days
time_decay_days.description: Number of days for behavioral signals to decay to 50%

partition_type.label: Partition Type
partition_type.description: Enable partitioning: 'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly', 'hourly' for time-based; 'static' for a fixed set of values (e.g. customers); 'multi' for date × static (e.g. day × customer). Leave empty for unpartitioned.

partition_start.label: Partition Start Date
partition_start.description: ISO date string for the first partition, e.g. '2024-01-01'. Required for time-based and multi partition types.

partition_date_column.label: Partition Date Column
partition_date_column.description: Column used to filter rows to the current date partition key (e.g. 'event_date', 'created_at').

partition_values.label: Partition Values
partition_values.description: Comma-separated values for static or multi partitioning, e.g. 'acme_corp,globex,initech'. Required for static and multi types.

partition_static_dim.label: Static Dimension Name
partition_static_dim.description: Name for the static partition dimension in multi-partitioning, e.g. 'customer' or 'region'. Defaults to 'segment'.

partition_static_column.label: Static Partition Column
partition_static_column.description: Column used to filter rows to the current static partition value (e.g. 'customer_id', 'region').

owners.label: Owners
owners.description: Asset owners — team names (team:analytics) or email addresses.

asset_tags.label: Asset Tags
asset_tags.description: Key-value tags applied to the asset in the Dagster catalog, e.g. {"domain": "finance"}.

kinds.label: Kinds
kinds.description: Asset kinds shown in the Dagster catalog (e.g. snowflake, python). Auto-inferred from component name if empty.

freshness_max_lag_minutes.label: Freshness Max Lag (minutes)
freshness_max_lag_minutes.description: Maximum acceptable lag in minutes before this asset is considered stale.

freshness_cron.label: Freshness Cron Schedule
freshness_cron.description: Cron schedule for the freshness policy, e.g. '0 9 * * 1-5' (weekdays 9am).

column_lineage.label: Column Lineage
column_lineage.description: Column-level lineage: output column → list of upstream input columns it derives from, e.g. {"revenue": ["price", "quantity"]}.

deps.label: Deps
deps.description: Upstream asset keys this asset depends on (e.g. [
